item.name: Stargilt Lobster
item.description:
Uniquely well suited to survival in Ultima Thule. Uniquely poorly suited to survival on a star where most races enjoy the taste of lobster and laying claim to shiny objects.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: Despite its resemblance to gold leaf, the coating on a stargilt lobster's carapace serves the practical purpose of protection amidst the odd aetherial eddies of its habitat. Should one boil the creature like a common lobster, the coating will dissolve and lend the flesh a complex flavor─as will the knowledge of contributing to the extinction of a dead star's few survivors.

obj.n: Tome of Ichthyological Folklore - The Sea of Stars
